title: dubautia waialealae
intro: Dubautia waialealae, also known as Ma'o hau hele, is a rare and endangered Hawaiian plant species that belongs to the sunflower family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective against wounds, infections, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Dubautia waialealae include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and improve skin health. Dubautia waialealae is typically prepared as a topical application, often in the form of a salve or poultice, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
